acceptance.requirement: fap-web contract test can read O59 fixture copied or referenced from fap-api PR #1129 fixture
valid payload enters Big5 V2 rendered preview path
result_page_desktop renders required visible terms and no P0 forbidden terms
result_page_mobile renders required visible terms and no P0 forbidden terms
invalid payload safely falls back to old path without invented body copy
missing payload safely falls back to old path without claiming preview pass
PDF/share/history/compare either pass existing harness or are marked pending_surface
no backend, runtime, registry, or new prose changes are included in fap-web PR
Codex final report includes tested_surfaces, pending_surfaces, passed_surfaces, and failed_surfaces arrays
the term 'all' is checked only as a standalone visible placeholder/debug token, never by raw substring scan

revision_notes: v0.1.1 fixes manifest file list/count consistency.
v0.1.1 deduplicates surfaces arrays, including duplicated pdf entries.
v0.1.1 strengthens contextual all matching: no raw substring scan.

required_codex_output_structure.rule: Every declared surface must appear in exactly one of pending_surfaces, passed_surfaces, or failed_surfaces. pending_surfaces do not count as passed.
